title: Craftable String Recipe
description: Craft your Strings now!!! You cam get string from wool now. Just like how you get wool from string. Makes the game fair.
body:
# Craftable Strings

**Skip the Spider Slaughter** 

You know the drill. You want a bow, a fishing rod, a lead — and Minecraft says, “Go fight spiders.” So you wait for night, dodge creepers, and hope the drop gods are kind. Or worse… you punch cobwebs in mineshafts like a caveman. And if that fails? Time to grind emeralds and beg a Fletcher for a trade.

This datapack says: nah. Just craft the string and get on with your build


Note: “String Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack..If you are interested in motr datapacks check out hte links at the end of the description.

**🧠 Why It’s Better**

Because string is used in everything — bows, leads, fishing rods, tripwires — but somehow still locked behind mobs and trades. Whether you're building redstone traps, leashing your pets, or just trying to craft in peace, this pack gives you control without the grind.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip
   
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
   
3. Type /reload in-game
     
4. Start crafting your string and skip the spider shift
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
